name: Expert
skills: acrobatics: +4, performance: +4, persuasion: +4, sleight of hand: +4, stealth: +4
languages: Common, plus one of your choice

traits.name: Helpful
entries: The expert can take the Help action as a bonus action.

traits.name: Tools
entries: The expert has thieves' tools and a musical instrument.

actions.name: Shortsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Dagger
entries: Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack: 4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

name: Spellcaster
languages: Common, plus one of your choice

traits.name: Magical Role
entries: Choose a role for the spellcaster: healer or mage. Your choice determines which Spellcasting trait to use below.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Healer)
entries: The spellcaster's spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 12, 4 to hit with spell attacks). The spellcaster has following cleric spells prepared:

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Mage)
entries: The spellcaster's spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 12, 4 to hit with spell attacks). The spellcaster has following wizard spells prepared:

actions.name: Quarterstaff
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage, or 4 (1d8) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands.

name: Warrior
languages: Common, plus one of your choice

traits.name: Martial Role
entries: The warrior has one of the following traits of your choice:

- Attacker The warrior gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls.
- Defender The warrior gains the Protection reaction below.

actions.name: Longsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 6 (1d8 + 2) slashing damage, or 7 (1d10 + 2) slashing damage if used with two hands.

actions.name: Longbow
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 3 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.

reactions.name: Protection (Defender Only)
entries: The warrior imposes disadvantage on the attack roll of a creature within 5 feet of it whose target isn't the warrior. The warrior must be able to see the attacker.
